RT @georgediano: Peter Salasya is in Ol-Kalou campaigning for DCP, while Irungu Kang'ata is not allowed to do so because according to Gachagua, politics there are local. Salasya is in good books with Gachagua. It's also on public record that Salasya hates Sifuna with passion and has previously described the Linda Mwananchi Front as a confused and weak group. My point is simply this... everyone is safeguarding their own interests. While the position continues fighting each other, We the citizens continue to be used as pawns in their political chess game.

Anybody who thinks Ruto is of average mind and chanting one term will get him out of power is deluded and an enemy of Kenya. To defeat Ruto, we must address ourselves to the real issues. 1. What if there is no election next year?

James Orengo:If you talk to ordinary Kenyans today and ask them whether their lives are better than they were three or four years ago, they will tell you that life isn't as good as it should be. There are issues that were raised during the Gen Z movement two years ago, but nothing has really changed. That's why people are very unhappy. #Yanayojiri
